words.def: very stupid; not at all sensible
words.example: You must be mad to risk it.

words.def: having or using special powers to make impossible things happen or seem to happen
being the largest or most important of its kind
words.example: Be careful crossing the main road.

words.def: more than anything else; also used to talk about the most important reason for something
words.example: They eat mainly fruit and nuts.

words.def: being a man or boy
a large building or covered area that has many shops, restaurants, etc. inside it
the activity of running and controlling a business or similar organization
an occasion when people buy and sell goods; the open area or building where they meet to do this
the legal relationship between two people who are married to each other
the science of numbers and shapes. Branches of mathematics include arithmetic, algebra, geometry and trigonometry.
while something else is happening
words.example: Leave the cake to cool completely. Meanwhile, make the topping.

words.def: an official action that is done in order to achieve a particular aim
connected with or happening in the mind; involving the process of thinking
an act of referring to somebody/something in speech or writing
words.example: He made no mention of her work.

words.def: a dirty or untidy state
words.example: in a mess, The room was in a mess.

words.def: not severe or strong
words.example: a mild form of the disease

words.def: a unit for measuring distance equal to 1 609 metres or 1 760 yards
the way you are feeling at a particular time
words.example: in a … mood, She's in a good mood today (= happy and friendly).

words.def: used to form the comparative of most adjectives and adverbs with two or more syllables
words.example: She was far more intelligent than her sister.

words.def: a road vehicle with two wheels, driven by an engine, with one seat for the driver and often a seat for a passenger behind the driver
words.example: He never learned to ride a motorcycle or to drive a car.

words.def: a change of place or position
an act of moving the body or part of the body
wet earth that is soft and sticky
words.example: The car wheels got stuck in the mud.

words.def: the crime of killing somebody deliberately
words.example: He was found guilty of murder.

words.def: a piece of body tissue that you make tight and relax in order to move a particular part of the body; the tissue that forms the muscles of the body
connected with music; containing music
something that is difficult to understand or to explain
words.example: It is one of the great unsolved mysteries of this century.

words.def: the thin hard layer covering the outer tip of the fingers or toes
describing events or telling a story
a country considered as a group of people with the same language, culture and history, who live in a particular area under one government
connected with the place where you were born and lived for the first years of your life
in a way that you would expect
words.example: Naturally, I get upset when things go wrong.

words.def: a short distance away
a situation when something is necessary or must be done
a small thin piece of steel that you use for sewing, with a point at one end and a hole for the thread at the other
a district or an area of a town; the people who live there
words.example: We grew up in the same neighbourhood.

words.def: a complicated system of roads, lines, tubes, nerves, etc. that are connected to each other and operate together
coming straight after somebody/something in time, order or space
words.example: The next train to Baltimore is at ten.

words.def: not one of a group of people or things; not any
and not
words.example: She seemed neither surprised nor worried.

words.def: typical, usual or ordinary; what you would expect
usually; in normal circumstances
words.example: I would never normally discuss this.

words.def: located in the north or facing north; connected with or typical of the north part of the world or a region
words.example: the northern slopes of the mountains

words.def: a short piece of writing to help you remember something
words.example: Please make a note of the dates.

words.def: (at) the present time
not in or to any place
words.example: I had nowhere to live, so I was sleeping on my sister's couch.

words.def: using, producing or resulting from nuclear energy
easy to see or understand
words.example: I know you don't like her but try not to make it so obvious.

words.def: used when giving information that you expect other people to know already or agree with
words.example: Obviously, we don't want to spend too much money.

words.def: a particular time when something happens
words.example: on an occasion, on this/that occasion

words.def: to happen
words.example: When exactly did the incident occur?

words.def: the mass of salt water that covers most of the earth’s surface
words.example: The ship was dredged from the depths of the ocean.

words.def: not modern; no longer fashionable
on one occasion only; one time
